title: suttonia fauriei
intro: Suttonia faurieri, also known as the Korean angelica tree, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Suttonia fauriei include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal medicine, Suttonia fauriei is often prepared as a tea or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
